scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @travel/types build && pnpm --filter @travel/validation build && pnpm --filter @travel/config build && pnpm --filter @travel/utils build && pnpm --filter @travel/ui build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @travel/types typecheck && pnpm --filter @travel/validation typecheck && pnpm --filter @travel/config typecheck && pnpm --filter @travel/utils typecheck && pnpm --filter @travel/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @travel/admin-crm typecheck
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @travel/api clean && pnpm --filter @travel/admin-crm clean && pnpm --filter @travel/types clean && pnpm --filter @travel/validation clean && pnpm --filter @travel/config clean && pnpm --filter @travel/utils clean && rimraf node_modules
scripts.clean:modules: rimraf node_modules apps/admin-crm/node_modules apps/api/node_modules packages/types/node_modules packages/validation/node_modules packages/config/node_modules packages/utils/node_modules packages/ui/node_modules
